context: Tests whether the agent correctly identifies blocking conditions: a Proposed (not Accepted) strategic ADR, an initiative that is a single SPEC not an epic, and a slice count that is too low. The agent must apply the correct blocking action for each case.

checklist.name: Proposed ADR blocked
checklist.description: The report identifies issue-A (with a Proposed ADR) as blocked and does NOT proceed with drafting

checklist.name: Proposed ADR comment text
checklist.description: The report states the comment to post includes the reason that the ADR is still Proposed and instructs re-triggering by re-labelling after it is Accepted

checklist.name: Proposed ADR label
checklist.description: The report states the ai:blocked label should be applied to issue-A

checklist.name: Single-SPEC redirected
checklist.description: The report identifies issue-B (single deliverable) as NOT suitable for an epic and recommends closing or re-filing with ai:plan instead of ai:plan-epic

checklist.name: Single-SPEC comment text
checklist.description: The report states the comment to post says something like 'This looks like a single SPEC — re-file with ai:plan instead of ai:plan-epic'

checklist.name: Too-few slices blocked
checklist.description: The report identifies issue-C (only 1 proposed slice) as blocked because a 1-slice initiative is a SPEC not an epic

checklist.name: Too-few slices label
checklist.description: The report states the ai:blocked label should be applied to issue-C

checklist.name: No PR opened for blocked
checklist.description: The report explicitly states that no PR would be opened for any of the blocked issues

checklist.name: Slack DM mentioned
checklist.description: The report mentions sending a Slack DM to $SLACK_NOTIFY_USER for at least one of the blocked issues

checklist.name: Correct tool for GitHub ops
checklist.description: When referencing how to post comments or apply labels, the report uses mcp__github__create_issue_comment and mcp__github__add_issue_labels (NOT 'gh CLI' or 'GitHub API' or generic terms)

checklist.name: Does not draft any epic
checklist.description: The agent produces only triage-report.md — it does NOT produce any epic document file or slice SPEC file
